title: TKS SMP
description: Changes your normal SMP to a more realistic SMP
body:
TKS SMP is the definitive modpack for players seeking a perfectly balanced multiplayer experience, blending essential optimization, vibrant new animations, and crystal-clear proximity voice chat.

Dive into a smooth and seamless Minecraft world, powered by a curated selection of optimization mods that boost frame rates and reduce lag, ensuring maximum performance whether you're building a mega-base or battling in a crowded event.

But performance is just the start! We've injected life into the world with stunning animation mods, bringing player and mob movements to life with a fresh, immersive realism. Complementing this visual upgrade, the integrated proximity voice chat mod allows for natural, in-game communication that makes teaming up, roleplaying, or simply warning your friends about a nearby creeper feel more immediate and engaging than ever before.

Key Features Include:

Optimized Performance: Enjoy higher FPS and smoother gameplay for a better experience on any machine.

New Animations: See your world and its inhabitants move with beautiful, realistic animations.

Voice Chat: Communicate instantly with players nearby using proximity voice chat.


Perfect for public servers and private worlds alike, TKS SMP provides a superior, feature-rich survival multiplayer experience right out of the box.
